Table of Contents

Interface IOverviewTileParameters

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control overview tile parameters.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("5A70D2D7-2810-4A5B-8791-5DB54AEC9BCF")]
public interface IOverviewTileParameters

Properties

AoiGeometry

The polygon within which overview tiles are created.

IGeometry AoiGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

CellSize

The cell size of the first level of overview tiles in the units of the coordinate system of the catalog. If this property is not specified, the default value is computed automatically.

double CellSize { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Levels

The number of levels of overview tiles created.

int Levels { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumSizeOfTopmostOverview

The recommended maximum size (in pixels) on any dimension for the lowest resolution overview item. A higher value for this property results in fewer levels of overviews. The operation continues to define a new level as long as the number of pixels of the overv

int MaximumSizeOfTopmostOverview { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Origin

The origin of the grid containing overview tiles.

IPoint Origin { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

OverviewFactor

The factor by which two neighboring overview levels differ.

int OverviewFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

TileCols

The recommended number of pixel columns in each overview tiles.

int TileCols { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

TileRows

The recommended number of pixel rows in each overview tiles.

int TileRows { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WorkspaceName

The workspace name where overview raster datasets are generated and stored.

IWorkspaceName WorkspaceName { get; set; }

Property Value

IWorkspaceName
